steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
And  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
And  I search 'available' book of distributor 'Palace Marketplace' and bookType 'EBOOK' from "LYRASIS Reads" and save as 'bookNameInfo'
And  I switch to 'eBooks' catalog tab
And  Open EBOOK book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
And  Click RETURN action button on book details screen
Then  I check that book contains GET action button on book details screen

afterStages.name: hooks.logout.LogoutHooks.logout()
